title: Verify Manage Trial section is accessible from multiple entry points
description: Test that all entry points (widget, floating pill, profile icon, manage subscription) lead to consistent Trial Corner experience

steps.description: 1. Access Trial Corner from homepage widget - verify landing
3. Access Trial Corner from floating pill - verify landing
4. Access Trial Corner from profile icon - verify landing
5. Access Trial Corner from Manage Trial in settings - verify landing

expected_result: All entry points navigate to the same Trial Corner Hub with consistent UI and functionality
